languages.text: {n}Орудие предупреждающе рычит и дергается в своих цепях, но вскоре затихает, продолжая испепелять вас взглядом.{/n}

traits.locale_text: Я все еще тут и все еще рычу
{n}Орудие предупреждающе рычит и дергается в своих цепях, но вскоре затихает, продолжая испепелять вас взглядом.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The engine emits a warning growl and thrashes in its chains, but quickly calms down and remains still, following you with a hateful gaze.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Орудие предупреждающе рычит и дергается в своих цепях, но вскоре затихает, продолжая испепелять вас взглядом.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The engine emits a warning growl and thrashes in its chains, but quickly calms down and remains still, following you with a hateful gaze.{/n}

{n}The engine emits a warning growl and thrashes in its chains, but quickly calms down and remains still, following you with a hateful gaze.{/n}
{n}The engine emits a warning growl and thrashes in its chains, but quickly calms down and remains still, following you with a hateful gaze.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Motor gibt ein warnendes Knurren von sich und ruckelt in seinen Ketten, beruhigt sich aber schnell wieder und bleibt ruhig stehen, um Ihnen mit einem hasserfüllten Blick zu folgen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The engine emits a warning growl and thrashes in its chains, but quickly calms down and remains still, following you with a hateful gaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Motor gibt ein warnendes Knurren von sich und ruckelt in seinen Ketten, beruhigt sich aber schnell wieder und bleibt ruhig stehen, um Ihnen mit einem hasserfüllten Blick zu folgen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le moteur émet un grognement d'avertissement et s'agite dans ses chaînes, mais se calme rapidement et reste immobile, vous suivant d'un regard haineux.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The engine emits a warning growl and thrashes in its chains, but quickly calms down and remains still, following you with a hateful gaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le moteur émet un grognement d'avertissement et s'agite dans ses chaînes, mais se calme rapidement et reste immobile, vous suivant d'un regard haineux.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El motor emite un gruñido de advertencia y se sacude en sus cadenas, pero rápidamente se calma y permanece quieto, siguiéndote con una mirada de odio.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The engine emits a warning growl and thrashes in its chains, but quickly calms down and remains still, following you with a hateful gaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El motor emite un gruñido de advertencia y se sacude en sus cadenas, pero rápidamente se calma y permanece quieto, siguiéndote con una mirada de odio.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Motor bir uyarı hırıltısı çıkarıyor ve zincirlerinde sallanıyor, ama hemen sakinleşiyor ve hareketsiz kalarak nefret dolu bakışlarla sizi takip ediyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The engine emits a warning growl and thrashes in its chains, but quickly calms down and remains still, following you with a hateful gaze.{/n}
